overall.description: Third-person game footage of an armored character walking through a vast, hazy desert landscape at dusk. The sepia-toned environment features scattered rock formations and sandy terrain under a dark, overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain with distant rock outcrops

agents.ego_description: armored character walking steadily through the desert sand toward distant formations

entered.detail: large dark rock formation rising from the sand on the left horizon
scattered boulders and rock outcrops visible on the right side
low rocky hills visible on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an expansive desert landscape under a hazy, dark sky. Distant rock clusters are visible on both sides while the sandy terrain stretches endlessly ahead.

events.description: character passes alongside the large rock cluster on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward, passing the left rock formation while approaching rocks on the right

entered.detail: individual rocks and small boulders scattered across the sand ahead

segments.scene_description: The character passes the left rock formation and continues through the desert, with the right-side rocks growing larger and closer. Scattered boulders begin to appear in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert terrain with scattered boulders

events.description: character turns slightly left while walking toward the rocky hills ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating toward the rocky terrain ahead with a slight left turn, moving between scattered boulders

entered.detail: large prominent boulders now visible in the immediate foreground
dense rocky hills and boulder fields directly ahead in the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns slightly left and approaches a denser rocky area, with large boulders now visible in the foreground. The distant hills grow closer as the terrain becomes more rugged and uneven.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast, hazy desert that gradually transforms from an open expanse into a rugged, boulder-strewn terrain. It begins with the character walking across an endless sandy plain under a dark, overcast sky, flanked by distant clusters of rocks. As the character advances, the left rock formation recedes while the formations on the right grow larger and closer, bringing scattered boulders into the immediate foreground. The scene then shifts as the character turns slightly left, moving away from the open flats and toward a denser rocky area. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly uneven and rugged as the camera approaches large foreground boulders and the distant hills loom closer.
